title: Author the plan template and registry accessors
description:
Author this repo's plan template and expose the accessors the planning-config consumers will adopt.

## Success Criteria
- [ ] [hard] REGB-01: the plan template is authored and round-trips through the loader.
- [ ] [hard] REGB-02: the registry yields, for a container type, the applicable template and its planning/breakdown node types, doc location, and breakable types.
